topics.title: Brenda Fricker, Home Alone 2 Favorite and Oscar-Winning My Left Foot Actress, Dies at 81
entities: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
topics.angle: Oscar-winning actress Brenda Fricker, known for 'My Left Foot' and 'Home Alone 2,' has died at 81.

sources.headline: Brenda Fricker, Home Alone 2 Favorite and Oscar-Winning My Left Foot Actress, Dies at 81
sources.summary: Fricker played the Central Park "pigeon lady" in "Home Alone 2: Lost in New York" The post Brenda Fricker, Home Alone 2 Favorite and Oscar-Winning My Left Foot Actress, Dies at 81 appeared first on TheWrap .

sources.headline: Brenda Fricker, Oscar-Winning Actress in ‘My Left Foot,’ Dies at 81
sources.summary: The history-making Dublin native also appeared in ‘The Field,’ ‘Home Alone 2: Lost in New York’ and ‘So I Married an Axe Murderer.’

sources.headline: Brenda Fricker, My Left Foot Oscar Winner, Dies at 81
sources.summary: Brenda Fricker, who became the first Irish actress to win an Oscar for her turn opposite Daniel Day-Lewis in 1989 s My Left Foot and captured hearts as the Pigeon Lady in 1992 s Home Alone 2, died on Thursday in Dublin. She was 81. Fricker s agent, Phil Belfield, confirmed her death to the BBC on Friday. [ ]

sources.headline: Brenda Fricker Dies: Oscar-Winning Actor Home Alone 2 s Central Park Pigeon Lady Was 81
sources.summary: Brenda Fricker, the Oscar-winning actress who had memorable roles in My Left Foot and Home Alone 2, has died after a period of ill health, according to her agent. She was 81. In a statement, her agent Phil Belfield confirmed Fricker s death and said: We will never see her like again and the world is [ ]
